paper_metadata.subject_name: From Theory to Practice: Implementing ESG and

subparts.text: Define ESG and explain its importance in modern corporate strategy.
List any two key environmental metrics used in ESG evaluations.
Mention any two principles of sustainable supply chain management.
Differentiate between carbon neutrality and carbon offsetting.
Define climate resilience in the context of business continuity.
Explain the concept of employee well-being in ESG.

questions.question_text: Discuss the evolution and significance of ESG in global investment and policy frameworks? 10
Critically evaluate the role of sustainability in shaping modern corporate strategies. 10
Explain in detail the environmental factors in ESG and their measurement frameworks? 10
Analyze strategies for reducing environmental impact across supply chains with examples? 10 CO Mapping
Evaluate the role of social factors in ESG and how they affect organizational performance. 10
How can organizations build and leverage human capital for long-term sustainable advantage? 10
Discuss the key components of sustainability reporting and compare two global reporting standards? 10
Analyze governance-related risks and how strong governance can turn them into opportunities? 10
